label: open
groundingNote: someone does something of one kind to a thing (at many times with the {urn:molecule-v0:hand|hand} [m]); before this, things cannot move into this thing, out of it, people cannot see what is inside it; after this, things can move into it, out of it, people can see what is inside it
notes: Artifact-operation molecule; polysemy (door/box/eyes) collapsed to the containment schema — research-grade judgement.
